prompt: I want to add a tooltip to an icon-only button that says 'Delete item'. The button opens a confirmation modal when clicked. Show me how to compose this correctly.

assertions.check: Code example includes label prop on IconButton (e.g. label='Delete item' or similar)
Code example wraps the IconButton inside a Tooltip component
Response mentions that HearthProvider or TooltipProvider must be present in the tree for Tooltip to work

assertions.text: Uses ModalRoot composition for the modal
assertions.check: Code example uses ModalRoot (not just Modal alone) as the root of the modal composition

assertions.text: Modal has a heading prop or accessible heading
assertions.check: The Modal in the code example has a heading prop for the confirmation dialog
